{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Queen of Karosha
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain]] is the exiled [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Queen of Karosha]] is in control of a vessel or station with controls.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“...the Captain of The Last Horizon, the exiled Queen of Karosha, and the Fallen Sword are the ones raiding their prison.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
